NetSparkleUpdater.​SignatureVerifiers.​DSAChecker
NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​ISignatureVerifier
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​SignatureVerifiers.​DSAChecker

Class that allows you to verify a DSA signature of some text, a file, or some other item based on a DSA public key

Variables
_cryptoProvider
private DSACryptoServiceProvider? _cryptoProvider
Functions
DSAChecker
public DSAChecker(
SecurityMode 
mode,
string? 
publicKey
 = 
null,
string? 
publicKeyFile
 = 
"NetSparkle_DSA.pub"
)

Create a DSAChecker object from the given parameters

Parameters
mode
SecurityMode

The SecurityMode of the validator. Controls what needs to be set in order to validate an app cast and its items.

publicKey
string?

the DSA public key as a string (will be used instead of the file if available, non-null, and not blank)

publicKeyFile
string?

the public key file name (including extension)

HasValidKeyInformation
public bool HasValidKeyInformation()

SecurityMode
public SecurityMode SecurityMode {
get;
set
}

string 
signature,
ref 
ValidationResult

TryGetFileResource
private static Stream? TryGetFileResource(
string 
publicKey
)

Gets a file resource based on a public key at a given path

Parameter
publicKey
string

the file name of the public key

Returns

the data stream of the file resource if the file exists; null otherwise

TryGetResourceStream
private static Stream? TryGetResourceStream(
string 
publicKeyResourceName
)

Get a resource stream based on the public key

Parameter
publicKeyResourceName
string

the public key resource name

Returns

a stream that contains the public key if found; null otherwise
